svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph LR init["Initialize
Register views,
providers, templates"] data["Load Data
Fetch from APIs,
populate AppData"] solve["Solve
Calculate derived
values"] render["Render
Transform state
into output"] marshal["Marshal
Collect input
back into state"] init --> data --> solve --> render --> marshal marshal -. "user interaction" .-> solve style init fill:#fce4ec,stroke:#ef5350,color:#333 style data fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffa726,color:#333 style solve fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#43a047,color:#333 style render fill:#e3f2fd,stroke:#42a5f5,color:#333 style marshal fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#ab47bc,color:#333 ","style":"notebook"}
